Document:
# Apprentice
The Apprentice is the entry point into the Artisan department. Without the experience required to specialize, an Apprentice works across all crafting disciplines — assisting alchemists, smiths, and tailors alike. The role rewards curiosity and a willingness to learn.
## Responsibilities
- Assist specialized artisans with their work - Gather and sort raw materials for crafting - Learn the basics of alchemy, smithing, and tailoring - Handle tasks that experienced artisans don't have time for
## Starting Skills
Apprentices begin with [bold]AlchemyVision[/bold] — the same skill used by Alchemists to identify magical properties in reagents. This makes Apprentices natural helpers in the laboratory from day one.
## Requirements
None — the Apprentice role is open to all players with no playtime requirement. It is the ideal starting job for anyone interested in the Artisan department.
## Tips
- Coordinate with the Alchemist to handle ingredient collection and sorting - Use the [textlink="Crafting" link="OE14Crafting"] guide to learn what you can make - Study [textlink="Alchemy" link="OE14_EN_Alchemy"] — your AlchemyVision skill makes the laboratory accessible immediately
